name: Unit Tests for Business Logic
description: All business logic functions must have corresponding unit tests. PRs adding business logic without tests should be rejected.
auto_fix_hint: Add XCTestCase subclass covering happy path, edge cases, and error paths

name: Mock External Dependencies
description: Tests must not make real network calls or access real databases. Use mocks/stubs for all external dependencies.
auto_fix_hint: Create protocol-conforming mock objects and inject via initializer

name: Test Coverage for Error Paths
description: Error cases and edge conditions must be tested, not just the happy path.
auto_fix_hint: Add XCTAssertThrowsError tests for each error case

name: UI Tests for Critical Flows
description: Critical user journeys (login, payment, transfer) must have XCUITest coverage.
auto_fix_hint: Add XCUITest for the critical flow end-to-end

examples.bad: // No UI tests for the payment flow
